source.description: Six-panel marker-doodle contact sheet generated with the process-first workflow, then cropped into step frames and the finished image.
source.notes: Chosen after a quick event check because Independence Day is approaching in early July 2026.

process_strategy: A six-panel marker process builds one firework burst from a center dot and radial guides to star tips, smaller spark marks, and bright marker fills before the final outline pass.

final_elements.name: center burst dot
final_elements.description: A small center point that anchors the firework burst.

final_elements.name: radial burst lines
final_elements.description: Several lines radiating outward from the center.

final_elements.name: star tip shapes
final_elements.description: Pointed rounded starburst tips at the ends of the main rays.

final_elements.name: bold black outline
final_elements.description: Thick handmade marker edges around the main burst rays.

final_elements.name: small spark dots
final_elements.description: Tiny dots and short dash sparks surrounding the main burst.

final_elements.name: red marker rays
final_elements.description: Bright red marker fill on alternating burst rays.

final_elements.name: blue marker rays
final_elements.description: Bright blue marker fill on the remaining burst rays.

final_elements.name: yellow center glow
final_elements.description: A yellow marker center and small yellow spark accents.

frames.visible_job: Places the center dot and the main radial burst lines.
Turns the ray ends into rounded pointed starburst tips.
Traces the main burst with bold black marker lines.
Adds tiny spark dots and short dash marks around the burst.
Adds red, blue, and yellow marker fills to the already drawn burst and sparks.

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthens existing outlines, red/blue/yellow fills, and already placed spark marks.

rejection_checks: No new burst arm, spark cluster, lettering, flag, or color choice should first appear in the final image.
The final must keep the same centered burst, ray count, spark placement, and color plan as the step frames.
The final must read as a handmade marker doodle, not a clean vector icon or poster graphic.
